examples: She analyses herself with great subtlety.
African dance is vigorous, but full of subtlety, requiring great strength and control.
Nobody that we have dealt with has ever taken as much time to understand the subtlety of the science and all the different complications.
Big, bold flavors were more distinguishing for the fledgling craft-brew industry than subtlety and snap.
Anyone who understands the traditional subtlety of the Chinese mandarinate knows what this means.
